title: RFC 9457 Problem Details
description: Standard error response format per RFC 9457 (Problem Details for HTTP APIs). All CounselConduit API errors MUST conform to this schema. See AGENTS.md rule 5.

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type. When dereferenced, it SHOULD provide human-readable documentation.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. It SHOULD NOT change from occurrence to occurrence.

status.description: The HTTP status code generated by the origin server.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.
examples: You have exceeded the rate limit of 100 requests per minute.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.
